case_title: ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS BUCKLEY PATRICIA

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKLEY PATRICIA HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
BENCH WARRANT SENT TO PATRICIA BUCKLEY RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,927.70 FILED BY ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKLEY PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM DEC-02-1992 TO DEC-14-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKLEY PATRICIA
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-31-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF AUG-05-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKLEY PATRICIA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-08-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKLEY PATRICIA
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-14-1992, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKLEY PATRICIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUCKLEY PATRICIA $1,927.70 PRINCIPAL, $56.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,983.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
